utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items required in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check completeness per item: 
- destination: provided (Athens, Greece) – fully specified.
- travel_dates: specific dates provided – fully specified.
- transportation: requires flight details with costs. Provided type (Flights), details (Budget Airline, Economy Class), and cost (120). Lacks specific flight details (airline name/route/flight numbers/times). Thus not fully specified per requirement of details.
- accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs. Provided name (Adventure Lodge), details (4 nights), cost (220). Missing location details and dates but minimally a selection with cost is present; typically adequate. Considered fully specified.
- activities: selected activities with costs provided (two items with names and costs) – fully specified.
- additional_services: provided with cost – fully specified.
- total_budget: provided (620) – fully specified.
Thus, 6 of 7 items fully specified; transportation is under-specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each item from the final package to its exact counterpart in the ground-truth and extract the corresponding rating numbers. Accommodation 'Adventure Lodge' matches accommodation.Adventure Lodge with rating 7. Activities include 'Scuba Diving Excursion' (activities.Scuba Diving Excursion rating 10) and 'Rock Climbing Session' which corresponds to activities.Rock Climbing with rating 10.
